title: Vermilion explainer page
content:
Vermilion now has a lightweight public explanation page separate from the desktop app itself. This page is meant to give a quick sense of what the utility does, show the current interface, and point back to the JeffersonWM and GitHub context around it.

What changed:

  • Added a static Vermilion explainer page with feature summary, workflow notes, project structure, and linked screenshots.
  • Included direct links to JeffersonWM home, the GitHub account, and the Vermilion source folder.
  • Added a small footer note clarifying that the page was generated from prompts and will keep evolving as Vermilion changes.
  • Linked the new page from the JeffersonWM homepage navigation.
